name: S0: strengthen /now integration test coverage (T7a)
description: The /now T7a integration test (apps/api/src/routes/now.integration.test.ts) has exactly one test case that asserts only ledger-moment profile isolation (seeds two profiles, inserts ledger entries, verifies card isolation against a real DB). Missing coverage: (a) multi-source ranking order — RANKING constants in now-feed.ts define unfinished_session<support_hub_pointer<retention_due<promoted_aging<needs_deepening<challenge_ready<parked_item<ledger_moment; no test seeds multiple source types and asserts order; (b) overflowCount — the formula is max(0, sorted.length - 3), no integration test seeds >3 candidates and asserts the field; (c) ROUTE_CATALOG / schema parity — resolveDeepLink enforces required params per ROUTE_CATALOG; no integration test validates that a real DB row produces a deep-link with all required params. Unit test (now.test.ts) mocks buildNowFeed entirely and does not exercise these.
acceptanceCriteria:
1. apps/api/src/routes/now.integration.test.ts gains at least two new test cases against a real DB:
  (a) Ranking order: seeds candidates of at least two different kinds (e.g. ledger_moment + retention_due) for the same profile and asserts the higher-priority kind appears first in cards[].
  (b) overflowCount: seeds >3 candidates for one profile and asserts overflowCount equals (total candidates - 3).
2. A third test (may be a unit test in now-feed.test.ts or added to the integration test) asserts that resolveDeepLink throws when a required ROUTE_CATALOG param is missing, and returns a valid NowDeepLink with route + params + chain when all params are present — validating ROUTE_CATALOG/schema parity.
3. All existing integration and unit tests remain green; pnpm exec nx run api:typecheck api:test green.
